profile.name: Kylle Doe
profile.description: I build full-stack tools and AI automations that turn complex operational work into clear, dependable systems—from responsive dashboards and REST APIs to n8n workflows and production deployments.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Developer
bullets: Build internal medical-operations tools spanning patient intake, status tracking, scheduling, EMR, billing, authorization, eligibility, custody, insurance verification, and team coordination.
Deliver Vite, Node.js, and MySQL features across dashboards, APIs, routes, controllers, and database-backed workflows.
Reduced manual workload by about 50% by replacing spreadsheet processes and multi-step coordination with automated workflows and one-click actions.
Build n8n and AI-assisted pipelines with webhooks, OpenAI, structured outputs, Crawl4AI, Firecrawl, ImageKit, and ClickUp integrations.
Support Docker-based deployments, SSH, SSL, domains, subdomains, backups, and staging workflows.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Used AI-assisted development tools, including ChatGPT and GitHub Copilot, to accelerate development, debugging, and system design.
Improved the official Kave Guild website through UI/UX enhancements and new features.
Contributed to Extragig, a mobile job-finding app, supporting architecture decisions and feature rollouts.
Built across web and mobile stacks with a focus on scalable, maintainable codebases.

projects.title: Medical Operations Platform
projects.description: An internal system for patient intake, status tracking, scheduling, EMR handling, billing, authorization, eligibility, custody, insurance verification, and team coordination.

projects.title: OrderOP Content Automation
projects.description: An n8n pipeline that collects restaurant branding, menus, images, colors, fonts, descriptions, and links from one URL, then produces structured, website-ready content.

projects.title: ClickUp Ticket Automation
projects.description: An AI-assisted workflow that turns vague project tasks into structured tickets with user stories, benefits, acceptance criteria, technical requirements, and automatic tag cleanup.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.details: Coursework included software engineering, databases, human-computer interaction, application development, software quality assurance, algorithms, and data structures.
